Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Vickie Gross.

Frank T. Pepler, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Rockstone capital, LLC, a Maryland limited liability company.
No appearance by defendants Rockstone Capital, LLC, a Maryland limited liability company or Dennis Canning.
Defaults were entered against defendants on November 13, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on December 15, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 9, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff rockstone Capital, LLC, a Maryland limited liability company, and against the Defaulted Defendants Dominion Wine Group, Ltd, a California corporation, and Dennis Canning, jointly and severally, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $123,019.54.
Prejudgment Interest 2,886.74.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $793.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $126,699.28.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than February 18, 2010.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
